Reunion 2026

A Weekend to Remember, A Legacy to Celebrate

August 14-16, 2026 • Nashville, Tennessee

Join Us This Summer

After years of planning, we're bringing the Street family together for an unforgettable weekend. From formal dinners to outdoor activities, cultural events to intimate family gatherings, Reunion 2026 offers something for every generation. Reconnect with distant cousins, celebrate shared heritage, and create memories that will last a lifetime.

Event Schedule

2:00 PM – 6:00 PM

Grand Ballroom

Sunday, August 16

10:00 AM – 12:00 PM

Terrace Room

1:00 PM

Farewell & Safe Travels

Hotel Lobby

Accommodations

Hotel Grand Nashville

Our official reunion hotel offers special group rates and is conveniently located in downtown Nashville. Modern rooms, excellent service, and on-site dining and entertainment.

$119/night

Use code: STREETFAM2026 when booking

Book Hotel →

Alternative Accommodations

Prefer Airbnb or other lodging? Nashville has abundant options nearby. We recommend staying within 2 miles of Hotel Grand for easy access to reunion events.

  • • Airbnb apartments & vacation rentals
  • • Downtown Nashville hotels
  • • Family-run bed & breakfasts

Travel Information

Flying to Nashville

Nashville International Airport (BNA) serves major airlines from across the US. Airport shuttles and ride-sharing available. 20 minutes to downtown.

Hotel Parking

Hotel Grand offers complimentary parking for reunion guests. Valet and self-parking available. Mention your room number.

Local Transportation

Downtown Nashville is walkable. Uber/Lyft available throughout the city. Public transit bus system also available.

RSVP & Purchase Tickets

Tickets secure your place at all reunion events including meals and activities. Early bird pricing available through July 31st. Family bundles offer additional savings.

Individual Pass

$149

Early bird rate through July 31

All 3 days of events
Welcome & farewell meals
Gala dinner & dance

BEST VALUE

$499

Early bird rate through July 31

Up to 4 family members
All events & activities

One-Day Pass

$59

Day of your choice

One day of events
Meals included
Flexible option

All registrations must be completed by August 1, 2026. Questions? Email hello@streetfamilyreunion.com

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I bring a guest who is not a Street family member?

Spouses and long-term partners are welcome. Please indicate this when registering. Other guests may be accommodated; email us to discuss.

Are there activities for children?

Yes! We're planning family-friendly activities, kids' games, and a special children's dinner. More details coming soon.

What if I can only attend one day?

One-day passes are available for $59. You'll still have access to main events and meals for that day. Saturday (Gala) is our biggest event!

Is financial assistance available?

We want all family members to join us. Please contact us if cost is a barrier, and we can discuss options.
